themes.exampleQuote: Sahil has been very kind and helpful with accepting custom orders whenever I come with my friends.
Delicious food! Authentic flavors! Must visit place.
The staff were extremely rude and dismissive, which made the atmosphere feel unwelcoming.
Sahil has been very kind and helpful with accepting custom orders.
Tried Indian food for the first time and I loved it. Excellent service!

notable_quote: Reva Modern Indian Cuisine is hands down our number one restaurant in Pittsburgh.
sentiment_summary: Reviewers consistently praise the food's authenticity and single out Sahil by name for attentive, flexible service; the friction is a recurring thread of staff interactions that read as condescending or dismissive, two reviews describe the front-of-house as unwelcoming enough to overshadow the food.
quarter_narrative: Thirty-three creators filmed Reva this past quarter, generating 373,000 plays on TikTok without the restaurant posting a single video of its own, and the gap is both the most telling and most consequential thing the data shows about this spring. The standout video came from @gabs_joella, whose caption explained she was helping promote her mom's restaurant, pulling 66,300 plays on a single post rooted in family feeling rather than food photography. That kind of earned reach is what Mola, the current Asian Kitchens family leader, has built a signal identity around through deliberate creator collaboration; Reva arrived at a similar outcome by accident, which says something real about the food and the room, but also underlines how fragile that position is. Closing the 72-day silence on Instagram while making even a minimal effort to surface the creator content already circulating would give Reva a compounding signal that its current rank does not yet reflect.
tldr_read: Thirty-three creators, 373K TikTok plays, and a conversion path with no gaps; Instagram has been quiet for 72 days. Ones to Watch, #1 in Pittsburgh Indian Restaurants.
tldr_meaning: The TikTok creator layer is already doing the city-visibility work; whether Reva climbs out of Ones to Watch depends on whether the restaurant's own social presence starts reflecting even a fraction of what those 33 creators have already documented.

diagnosis_pullquote.line: Thirty-Three Creators Built The Signal. Reva's Own Feed Has Been Silent For 72 Days.

playbook.headline: Restart the Instagram feed immediately
playbook.action: The account has been dormant 72 days; one post per week restores algorithm visibility and captures creators already filming here.

playbook.headline: Address the service consistency gap publicly
playbook.action: Two of eight sampled reviews cite condescending front-of-house interactions; a visible owner response to those reviews directly lifts sentiment standing.

playbook.headline: Repost creator TikToks to Instagram Reels
playbook.action: Thirty-three creators have already produced the content; sharing @gabs_joella's 66K-play video as a Reel costs nothing and fills the visual catalog gap.
